improvements_made: Created ViolacoesAgrupadas component that groups violations by collaborator (not by rule)
HARD violations: prominent Card with border-2, avatar with initials, action hint, red ring on grid cells
SOFT violations: lighter Card (border-1), amber styling, no action hint, no grid ring
Used REGRAS_TEXTO for human-readable rule names instead of technical codes
violatedCells Set filters only HARD violations with dates to highlight grid cells
Grid cells receive ring-2 ring-destructive when matched in violatedCells
All colors use dark: variants from CORES_VIOLACAO and CORES constants
Simplified violations display from flat 46-line list to reusable grouped component

implementation.verification_output: ContratoLista.tsx expanded from 108 to 360 lines with full CRUD: Create/Edit Dialog, Delete AlertDialog, CLT disclaimer, validation, error handling

improvements_made: Implemented full CRUD: Create/Edit/Delete functionality for contract types
Cards now show 4 properly formatted badges: horas_semanais (44h/sem), dias_trabalho (6 dias), max_minutos_dia using formatarMinutos() (9h30/dia), trabalha_domingo (Sim/Nao Badge)
Edit/Delete icon buttons added to each card (Edit, Trash2 icons)
Create button in PageHeader opens Dialog with empty fields
Edit Dialog: 5 fields (nome, horas_semanais, dias_trabalho, max_minutos_dia, trabalha_domingo) with validation (min/max, required)
CLT Disclaimer Card: border-l-4 border-blue-500 with Info icon, placed above form fields, always visible, exact text from PRD
Delete AlertDialog with confirmation: catches error with 'vinculados'/'colaboradores', shows human message with count if available
Empty state: 'Crie um template para comecar' (removed technical 'Rode o seed' text)
Uses useApiData hook with reload() for fetching, toast (sonner) for all feedback
All colors use dark: variants or shadcn semantic (destructive, muted, primary)
Validation before save: checks min/max ranges for all numeric fields, shows toast errors
Helper text for max_minutos_dia: 'Exemplo: 9h30 = 570 minutos'
Checkbox used for trabalha_domingo (Switch not installed as per plan)
mapError() used for generic errors, custom handling for delete constraint violations
Dialog titles change based on mode: 'Novo Tipo de Contrato' vs 'Editar Tipo de Contrato'
Button text changes based on state: 'Salvando...', 'Excluindo...', 'Criar Tipo', 'Salvar Alteracoes'
